headline: Karl Darlow
body: Manchester United finalising a deal to sign Karl Darlow on a free. Agreement in place with player, as lauriewhitwell called.🧤 Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Karl Darlow is an option for Manchester United as they search for a back-up goalkeeper, as TheAthleticFC called. Darlow's Leeds United contract expires this summer, although Leeds are trying to extend his current deal. As reported, Manchester United keen to add another keeper due to the expected departures of Andre Onana and Altay Bayindir.🧤 —
raw_text:
Manchester United finalising a deal to sign Karl Darlow on a free. Agreement in place with player, as @lauriewhitwell called.🧤




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Karl Darlow is an option for Manchester United as they search for a back-up goalkeeper, as @TheAthleticFC called.

Darlow's Leeds United contract expires this summer, although Leeds are trying to extend his current deal.

As reported, Manchester United keen to add another keeper due to the expected departures of Andre Onana and Altay Bayindir.🧤





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2064309470340293029#m
